title: clinogyne flexuosa
intro: Clinogyne flexuosa, also known as the flexible clinogyne, is a species of flowering plant in the family Boraginaceae. Research has shown that this plant possesses medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The health benefits of Clinogyne flexuosa are thought to include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health. Clinogyne flexuosa is sometimes used in herbal preparations, such as teas and tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
